data.title: 国际服开服水角色
data.summary: First up, I prepared a little intro for you. Heehee. I feel a little embarrassed putting this togeth
data.body:
First up, I prepared a little intro for you.
Heehee. I feel a little embarrassed putting this together,
but I want you to know I'll be helping you to the best of my ability from now on. 
I can't wait for the fun we're going to have!
#BlueArchive
![SGnjC3vZVGwkJTQxQLB7n6tky9OLgsv7.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/SGnjC3vZVGwkJTQxQLB7n6tky9OLgsv7.jpg)

[Student Intro - Shiroko]

It's the seemingly frigid yet sports-loving Shiroko!
They say her expression doesn't change even when on a mission...
Do you think that's true?
#BlueArchive
![s6joPH2cIz14gADMqnXOap7EAZR3qspF.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/s6joPH2cIz14gADMqnXOap7EAZR3qspF.jpg)

[Student Intro - Serika]

Oh, it's Serika!
She can be a little rough around the edges sometimes,
but no one cares about Abydos more than she does!
I heard she has a naïve side to her too and falls for a lot of obvious pranks.♪
#BlueArchive
![YHLqa1s5a9shPx9XLNH6dsDCQvkRHv03.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/YHLqa1s5a9shPx9XLNH6dsDCQvkRHv03.jpg)

[Student Intro - Nonomi]

This is Nonomi, a warm and kind hearted friend to all!
I hear one of the Countermeasures Council's mysteries is...
just how high her credit limit is!
![1gQMrZtAcEKoO0aoUTqytMOHtDMzTR7B.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/1gQMrZtAcEKoO0aoUTqytMOHtDMzTR7B.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hoshino]

Hoshino's laid back attitude often gets her in trouble with Ayane.
But Hoshino knows when to kick it into another gear when it comes to carrying out her Countermeasures Council duties!
#BlueArchive
![5KrWkQXtSfXW6ca5qO7XbsYUDl6NjJA8.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/5KrWkQXtSfXW6ca5qO7XbsYUDl6NjJA8.jpg)

[Student Intro - Haruka]

Haruka, the youngest member of Private Eye 68!
She is usually very shy and timid... but she can also be one of their most terrifying members!
#BlueArchive
![h8t9lImxYJRlws32RHou81fpxdfiddUJ.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/h8t9lImxYJRlws32RHou81fpxdfiddUJ.jpg)

[Student Intro - Mutsuki]

It's Mutsuki, the club's little yet biggest troublemaker!
She usually would rather bug Aru than do actual club work.
#BlueArchive
![OE2ExMveaJyPlhPYHLC9qtUI9ZCqixwU.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/OE2ExMveaJyPlhPYHLC9qtUI9ZCqixwU.jpg)

[Student Intro - Kayoko]

Kayoko is often misunderstood by those around her due to her stern expression, but she is actually very affectionate. 
Maybe one day she'll be willing to open and show her warmheartedness?
#BlueArchive
![0aMqST3G7xN8BVgC74nJ5r2ARGFZ3Rbs.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/0aMqST3G7xN8BVgC74nJ5r2ARGFZ3Rbs.jpg)

[Student Intro - Aru]

The boss of Private eye 68!
Aru may daydream of being ruthless outlaw...but there's something about her that says she's anything but that, isn't there?
#BlueArchive
![zLR3GCbsPJTdeJbeSjGInjOd6VatWEIQ.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/zLR3GCbsPJTdeJbeSjGInjOd6VatWEIQ.jpg)

[Student Intro - Chinatsu]

Here's Chinatsu! She's in charge of medical aid at the Disciplinary Committee.
She's also the one who often has to rein in her clubmates at times.
That must be a really exhausting job...
#BlueArchive
![dHuvvrEDWmiKD4v4KQCGJgn43olRaHYY.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/dHuvvrEDWmiKD4v4KQCGJgn43olRaHYY.jpg)

[Student Intro - Iori]

You could say Iori is the firepower of the Disciplinary Committee.
She's an ace when it comes to carrying out her orders, but she also has a knack for falling into traps because she's so stubborn!
#BlueArchive
![qsqcYRNnI5xegPwtKrSTXCjgF05OzgeM.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/qsqcYRNnI5xegPwtKrSTXCjgF05OzgeM.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hina]

This is Hina, Gehenna's head prefect!
She's famous for her combat strength and judgment. Her name alone sends chills down the spines of Gehenna's enemies!
But she's not above relying on her Sensei sometimes too.
#BlueArchive
![EEm3m7fRt2JwNG1V3tfsosAeOidDVo41.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/EEm3m7fRt2JwNG1V3tfsosAeOidDVo41.jpg)

[Student Intro - Izumi]

Izumi is a fan of gourmet and exotic foods alike!
I knew the Gourmet Research Society had some strange tastes, but a hamburger with chocolate sauce? No thanks...
#BlueArchive
![ftwhOApoKAOqL8Xsi3qS7mvH6ZXcSEaL.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/ftwhOApoKAOqL8Xsi3qS7mvH6ZXcSEaL.jpg)

[Student Intro- Akari]

This is Akari, a famous glutton from the Gourmet Research Society!
Rumor has it she can eat 50 servings of food without even breaking a sweat...
Do you think buffets in Kivotos have her on their blacklists?
#BlueArchive
![CMMOm437Hzt7BRo57SV8e8IxICv2cQsE.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/CMMOm437Hzt7BRo57SV8e8IxICv2cQsE.jpg)

[Student Intro - Haruna]

Meet Haruna, the Gourmet Research Society president with an unrivaled passion for fine dining!
She claims no cost is too steep when it comes to excellence in taste!
#BlueArchive
![yLTj8EXrDOsr9ivXWeOhRVQYsC97cEtI.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/yLTj8EXrDOsr9ivXWeOhRVQYsC97cEtI.jpg)

[Student Intro - Juri]

This is Juri, a hard worker from the School Lunch Club!
She gives Fuuka a lot of trouble due to her...imaginative recipes.
I know you're passionate, Juri, but why is the mushroom soup purple?!
#BlueArchive
![VbxQ5X85YrnMmrwdJfGLBsPcZhdUL1FI.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/VbxQ5X85YrnMmrwdJfGLBsPcZhdUL1FI.jpg)

[Student Intro - Fuuka]

Fuuka is basically in charge of the Gehenna students' meals!
She's a good cook, but it's hard to serve an entire school good food with so little help...
I wish the Gourmet Research Society and other students would give her a break!
#BlueArchive
![TisGVnn9S0oiETrBEwc2jz7kJl0gndgx.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/TisGVnn9S0oiETrBEwc2jz7kJl0gndgx.jpg)

[Student Intro - Asuna]

Introducing Asuna, the bold team lead of C&C, a secret organization of Millennium!
She carries out her missions with a great sense of duty, but is known for occsionally going on rampages!
#BlueArchive
![uxtNdqAao1chGYyfPcSotLmorPTxmwQ6.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/uxtNdqAao1chGYyfPcSotLmorPTxmwQ6.jpg)

[Student Intro - Akane]

Akane is an agent in charge of cleaning at the secret organization, C&C.
She may seem kind and warm at first glance... but would you think the same when she "cleans up" her enemies?
#BlueArchive
![Pk6nCPss2qEduNiLmbbIbpN84eSNaU4F.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Pk6nCPss2qEduNiLmbbIbpN84eSNaU4F.jpg)

[Student Intro - Karin]

This is Karin, a rear fire support specialist at C&C!
She may appear to have a bitter impression, but it's her cautiousness that allows C&C agents to run wild to their heart's content!
#BlueArchive
![nUPiDyoNgxoJFnKdmydZmvfvoOZpWIDJ.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/nUPiDyoNgxoJFnKdmydZmvfvoOZpWIDJ.jpg)

[Student Intro - Neru]

C&C's diminutive leader is named Neru!
Despite her small stature, it is said that no one at Millennium comes close to matching her strategies.
Oh, and it's forbidden to talk about height in front of Neru!
#BlueArchive
![6d9aPqywnSdluDXwwgzeNLN18Sh6N6z8.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/6d9aPqywnSdluDXwwgzeNLN18Sh6N6z8.jpg)

[Student Intro - Kotama]

A skilled hacker of Millennium, Kotama specializes in wiretapping!
She may already be listening in on Sensei's private conversations!
#BlueArchive
![P1pn2kMIR1xUN5d13nGiYrPTOPEvvVVn.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/P1pn2kMIR1xUN5d13nGiYrPTOPEvvVVn.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hare]

Hare is considered a genius even within Millennium.
Rather than showing off, she's a humble soul who listens intently to her friends!
#BlueArchive
![s5ILwWhO3uvQAK09FLJ4piS2ezwWSkqn.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/s5ILwWhO3uvQAK09FLJ4piS2ezwWSkqn.jpg)

[Student Intro - Maki]

Introducing Maki, a bright and vivacious graffiti artist!
She even designed the emblem of her club, Veritas!
#BlueArchive
![yIX0GpOYxgFGm8EDT79qZhetZf5ymnka.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/yIX0GpOYxgFGm8EDT79qZhetZf5ymnka.jpg)

[Student Intro - Kotori]

If there's any mention about physics or machines, Kotori will be the first to pipe up with her engineering expertise!
Kotori's explanations are always easy to understand, assuming you can stick with her through the whole thing...
#BlueArchive
![7lSMq7CIlPWvJ7VbKlzHIIVH9EAERvpF.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/7lSMq7CIlPWvJ7VbKlzHIIVH9EAERvpF.jpg)

[Student Intro - Utaha]

She's the President of Millennium's Engineering Club!
It’s said she earned her role as President by inventing a wide variety of robots.
#BlueArchive
![bcQxBqvadbmvCRLybhkBDA60VtI9o2hW.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/bcQxBqvadbmvCRLybhkBDA60VtI9o2hW.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hibiki]

This is Hibiki of the Engineering Club.
Her exceptional engineering talent allows her to invent many interesting things!
However, she can’t seem to stop herself from adding strange and unnecessary features...
#BlueArchive
![X6ivhMXnvJOmGjzVJYWMdbWyadsOFgad.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/X6ivhMXnvJOmGjzVJYWMdbWyadsOFgad.jpg)

[Student Info - Yuuka]

Introducing Yuuka, the treasurer of Seminar, aka Millennium's Student Council!
Her impressive math skills allow her to manage the entire budget of this huge academy.
So make sure nothing is left out when you submit a receipt to Yuuka, Sensei!
#BlueArchive
![IXlyEof5NzHNaVzOnnp0RKnKMr3684W3.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/IXlyEof5NzHNaVzOnnp0RKnKMr3684W3.jpg)

[Student Intro - Eimi]

It's hard to know what Eimi is usually thinking about, but no one can deny her amazing skills when it comes time to work!
She's got a...unique fashion sense, too!
#BlueArchive
![19VC87WXQ1gvXcGLo1lLe4kk00YeNzR6.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/19VC87WXQ1gvXcGLo1lLe4kk00YeNzR6.jpg)

[Student Intro - Sumire]

Sumire has a huge passion for physical training!
Once she starts training, you never know when it will end, so be careful when she asks to work out with you, Sensei!
#BlueArchive
![jxuTtEyimpUq2fLL5VYhAdltr32CUT8R.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/jxuTtEyimpUq2fLL5VYhAdltr32CUT8R.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hifumi]

A popular student thanks to her eternally warm-hearted and friendly personality!
Want to become her friend? Gift Hifumi limited edition Peroro merchandise and she'll be really happy!
#BlueArchive
![s99ifSbglVH7WiNVddaMVOcSUc8MYsMC.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/s99ifSbglVH7WiNVddaMVOcSUc8MYsMC.jpg)

[Student Intro - Suzumi]

A trusted member of the Vigilante Crew!
She shows her strong sense of responsibility by patrolling to protect students from attacks by other academies!
#BlueArchive
![DkbVu5Jb8icTwQJweNS5Ye2e4ABwuNpl.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/DkbVu5Jb8icTwQJweNS5Ye2e4ABwuNpl.jpg)

[Student Intro - Shimiko]

Shimiko is a librarian on the Library Committee, and a total bookworm.
If you have some spare time, it might be a good idea to get book recommendations from Shimiko!
#BlueArchive
![Fz7pRhLKut9yao1AqT7UvNMB4R6qcqk5.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Fz7pRhLKut9yao1AqT7UvNMB4R6qcqk5.jpg)

[Student Intro - Yoshimi]

Yoshimi is a member of the After-School Sweets Club.
She wants to grow taller and wiser, but those are far off goals for now.
She drinks a liter of milk every day, so surely she'll grow eventually, right?
#BlueArchive
![MBiHatFISln5fdfcSbYwgCPvR4OC96mq.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/MBiHatFISln5fdfcSbYwgCPvR4OC96mq.jpg)

[Student Intro - Airi]

Of all the desserts Airi likes, she really enjoys ice cream!
Mint chocolate chip is her favorite flavor!
How about you, Sensei?
#BlueArchive
![6pU9Gmje4q3R5m2KQ0g2RzBiS8svpkk7.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/6pU9Gmje4q3R5m2KQ0g2RzBiS8svpkk7.jpg)

[Student Intro - Serina]

Serina is a kind-hearted girl with the Remedial Knights.
Because she always takes care of her friends, they sometimes say she's like a mother!
#BlueArchive
![monJwL5ODZENuZaXuTw8BrAKOHjmpkK1.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/monJwL5ODZENuZaXuTw8BrAKOHjmpkK1.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hanae]

Hanae always makes people feel better with her optimistic and cheerful attitude!
She can sometimes cause a ruckus in front of patients, but if you're sick and see Hanae's smile, it might just make you feel like you'll recover soon!
#BlueArchive
![txzQ7LFWZfIGAEi7dfIMvc8H5IqGO2Ch.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/txzQ7LFWZfIGAEi7dfIMvc8H5IqGO2Ch.jpg)

[Student Intro - Hasumi]

This is Hasumi, second-in-command of the Justice Task Force!
Hasumi calmly punishes injustice, but somehow her composure seems to wane around scales...
#BlueArchive
![dtZOsAGe6nL9ZIL2CuoLAWGwZSstQX4v.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/dtZOsAGe6nL9ZIL2CuoLAWGwZSstQX4v.jpg)

[Student Intro - Tsurugi]

Introducing Tsurugi, the president of the Justice Task Force! Don't let her scary face scare you! She's shy but also has one mean roar!
#BlueArchive
![3VNQSqIJEFhiMyfbahxRV1q0WiD3hZRu.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/3VNQSqIJEFhiMyfbahxRV1q0WiD3hZRu.jpg)

[Student Intro - Pina]

Pina is an energetic student of Hyakkiyako who admires vigilantes!
She's not an actual vigilante, but perhaps her ambitious pursuit for justice makes her seem like one?
#BlueArchive
![2lhlqViyfTdMhu907St9etYCaGIPJTx8.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/2lhlqViyfTdMhu907St9etYCaGIPJTx8.jpg)

[Student Intro - Tsubaki]

Tsubaki is Hyakkiyako's 'Sleeping Beauty.'
She can sleep anywhere at any time...could there be a secret behind that?
#BlueArchive
![X6xm6yrsYHNIEtvMsLy5qIgcT8fPcwgP.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/X6xm6yrsYHNIEtvMsLy5qIgcT8fPcwgP.jpg)

[Student Intro - Chise]

This is Chise, a member of the Yin-Yang Club and known for her mysterious vibe.
She may seem odd at times, but it’s possible she’s just deep in thought.
#BlueArchive
![tNgUD1CIHubqa7lGbIxI98AkxXUk2lJl.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/tNgUD1CIHubqa7lGbIxI98AkxXUk2lJl.jpg)

[Student Intro - Saya]

Here's Saya! She's an eccentric inventor at the Shanhaijing Eastern Alchemy Society.
She's always looking for test subjects...but no one knows what the experiment is.

#BlueArchive
![HRA2XcM6IyAQzZPvv9eAVTwOexzzyCXv.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/HRA2XcM6IyAQzZPvv9eAVTwOexzzyCXv.jpg)

[Student Intro - Shun]

Introducing Shun, a friendly instructor at Shanhaijing.
Watching her care for the children of Plum Blossom Garden with such sincerity is very heartwarming!

#BlueArchive
![z4Mp01C6GtBGAqAv3GO2l50yZE1q1QbV.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/z4Mp01C6GtBGAqAv3GO2l50yZE1q1QbV.jpg)

[NPC Intro - Rin]

Introducing Rin, an officer of the General Student Council.
If you have any questions about Kivotos and Schale, she's the one to ask!

#BlueArchive
![dJhvcj2MmLK0bpNwEDFhBQtybHoZmYes.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/dJhvcj2MmLK0bpNwEDFhBQtybHoZmYes.jpg)

[NPC Intro - Momoka]

Momoka is an officer of the General Student Council who always has tasks for Sensei to do!
The only thing she enjoys more is her snack time...

#BlueArchive
![CAn2wgwl7lLLlnQuUGjwuBySqb0GEmWk.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/CAn2wgwl7lLLlnQuUGjwuBySqb0GEmWk.jpg)

[NPC Intro - Sora]

Sora is a part-timer at the Angel 24 convenience store in Schale.
I guess that means you'll be running into her a lot, huh?

#BlueArchive
![monL4SnehyOUsrAHhMHoSLYap0ADGWqc.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/monL4SnehyOUsrAHhMHoSLYap0ADGWqc.jpg)
